name: Amoxicillin
description: Ọgwụ nje aminopenicillin sara mbara. Ọgwụ nje prophylactic nke ọnụ maka ọrịa ọnya. Akụkụ nke ngwugwu ọgwụ ọgụ TCCC maka prophylaxis ọnya na mmerụ ahụ adịghị njọ.
indications: Prophylaxis ọrịa ọnya (ọnyá dị nro, mkpọ ọgwụ ọnụ)
dose: 500 mg PO kwa awa 8 x 7 ụbọchị (prophylaxis ọnya). 875 mg PO kwa awa 12 ọzọ.
window: Malite n'ime awa 3 nke mmerụ ahụ maka prophylaxis ọnya.
contraindications: Allergy penicillin mara amara (jiri doxycycline kama)
Mononucleosis (ihe ize ndụ nke ọkụ ọkụ)
warnings: Ọ bụrụ na nfụkasị penicillin: dochie doxycycline 100mg PO BID.
Ụzọ ọnụ naanị --eji ọgwụ nje IV (cefazolin/ciprofloxacin) maka ọnya siri ike ma ọ bụ ọ bụrụ na anabataghị ọnụ.

pediatric.dose: 25-45 mg / kg / ụbọchị kewara q8h (max 500 mg / dose). Jiri ntụaka Broselow dabere na ibu.

obstetric.note: Nchekwa na ime ime. Mmasị karịa doxycycline (nke a na-egbochi ime ime).

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / TCCC Combat Pill Pack
